4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> clearly explains why I'm accepting, aligning with the <player answer> and <newly proposed trade>. The <message> also reflects acceptance.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have used only 2 proposals, well within the limit of 3. Accepting does not violate any rules.
</critique>
